title: Progress Bar not working with Ai Columns?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Has anyone else run into this issue? I’ve set up my dream workflow where the status updates automatically based on the date using the AI Column — but now the progress bar no longer works!

I’d love to have both features working together. Has anyone found a workaround or native solution that allows the progress bar to function alongside the AI Column?

Appreciate any tips or ideas — thanks in advance!
